summary: Tested attendance duplicate fix: unique compound index on (employee_id, date), biometric import preventing duplicates, single punch handling, and date filtering. All 10 tests passed.

unique_compound_index.index_exists: PASS - unique_employee_date index exists on attendance(employee_id, date) with unique=True
unique_compound_index.prevents_duplicates: PASS - Two chunks for same employee+date results in exactly ONE record

biometric_import_upsert.two_chunks_one_record: PASS - Multiple imports for same employee+date merge into single record

single_punch_handling.in_set_out_null: PASS - Single punch results in check_in=09:30, check_out=null

date_filtering.returns_correct_range: PASS - GET /attendance?from_date=26-03-2026&to_date=27-03-2026 returns only records within range
date_filtering.excludes_out_of_range: PASS - January records not returned when querying March range

no_duplicates_in_db.verified: PASS - MongoDB aggregation confirmed 0 duplicate (employee_id, date) pairs

response_format.includes_required_fields: PASS - Response includes totalRecords, processed, skipped, unmapped, unmappedDeviceUserIds

critical_code_review_comments: The unique compound index is correctly implemented via ensure_indexes() on app startup
Biometric import uses atomic update_one with upsert=True which properly handles race conditions
Date filtering in GET /attendance correctly parses DD-MM-YYYY to YYYYMMDD integer for comparison
The sort is applied in Python after date filtering which is correct for the DD-MM-YYYY format
seed_data_creation: Tests created attendance records for March 26-28, 2026 for BDT-101 and BDT-102
context_for_next_testing_agent: All attendance duplicate fix features verified: (1) unique compound index exists and prevents duplicates, (2) biometric import two chunks = one record with MIN(IN)/MAX(OUT) merge, (3) single punch = IN set + OUT null, (4) date filtering uses Python-side DD-MM-YYYY parsing which works correctly, (5) results sorted descending. Test dates used: March 26-28, 2026. No issues found.

verification_summary.duplicate_count: 0 duplicates found via MongoDB aggregation pipeline
verification_summary.date_filter_logic: parse_ddmmyyyy() converts DD-MM-YYYY to YYYYMMDD integer for correct comparison
verification_summary.sort_order: date_sort_key() ensures proper chronological descending order
